language_selection: Выберите язык / Choose language / Оберіть мову:
welcome_new:
👋 Welcome to Mental Support!

To get access, enter the invite code provided by your HR manager.
code_invalid: ❌ Code not found. Please check and try again.
code_expired: ❌ This code has expired. Please contact your HR manager.
code_used: ❌ This code has already been used.
code_revoked: ❌ This code has been revoked. Please contact your HR manager.
code_rate_limit: ⚠️ Too many attempts. Please try again in 10 minutes.
welcome_success:
✅ Welcome! *{company}* cares about your mental health and grants you access to Mental Support.

We're glad you're reaching out for support. This is an important step. 💙
access_suspended: ⛔ Your access has been suspended. Please contact your HR manager.
user_blocked: ⛔ Your account has been blocked. Please contact your HR manager.
main_menu:
🏠 *Main Menu*

Your company cares about you — and we're here to help.
emergency_sent:
🚨 *Urgent Help Requested*

Please wait. Within 10–90 minutes, our Mental Support Consultant will reach out to you through this bot.

You are not alone — we are here. 💙
emergency_already_active: ⚠️ You already have an active urgent request. A consultant will contact you shortly.
urgent_accepted_by_you: ✅ You accepted the request. Connecting with the user...
urgent_accepted_by_other: ℹ️ Request accepted by another consultant.
urgent_connected:
🔗 Connected. You can now write — messages will be relayed to the user.

Press the button below to end the session.
conversation_ended_user:
✅ The session has ended. We're glad we could help!

Please rate how you feel after this session.
proxy_unsupported: ℹ️ This message type is not supported yet.
session_intro:
📅 *Session with Mental Consultant*

Describe your request (1–500 characters):

Our response time is 30 min – 3 hours depending on team availability. We respond and help everyone.
session_request_too_long: ⚠️ Message is too long. Maximum 500 characters.
session_no_slots: 😔 There are no available slots at the moment. Try again later or use urgent help.
session_slot_taken: ⚠️ This slot is already taken. Please choose another.
session_confirmed:
🎉 *Booking confirmed!*

We look forward to seeing you on {date} at {time}.
groups_list:
👥 *Support Groups*

Choose a group you're interested in:
groups_empty: 😔 No groups available right now. Check back later!
group_already_joined: ℹ️ You are already registered for this group.
group_joined:
✅ You have joined the group *{name}*!

See you there! 😊
group_notify_consultant:
👥 New participant joined the group *{name}*.
🏢 Company: {company}
my_sessions_empty: 📋 You have no booked sessions yet.
company_info:
🏢 *{company}*

You are registered as an employee of this company.
delete_account_confirm:
⚠️ *Delete account?*

All your data will be permanently deleted. This cannot be undone.
account_deleted: ✅ Your account has been deleted. Thank you for using Mental Support.
feedback_request:
💙 How are you feeling after the session?

Rate your state from 1 to 10, where 1 = very bad, 10 = excellent:
feedback_thanks: 🙏 Thank you for your feedback! Your input helps us improve.
feedback_comment_prompt: 💬 Would you like to add anything?
feedback_already_done: ℹ️ You have already submitted feedback for this session.
post_session_prompt:
🕐 Your session time has arrived.

How did it go?
cancel_reason_saved: ✅ Thank you for your feedback. We will look into this.
reminder_7d: 😊 One week left until your Mental Support session. We're looking forward to meeting you!
reminder_3d: 📅 Your session is in 3 days. If you need to reschedule, press the button below.
reminder_24h: ⏰ Tomorrow at {time} you have a session with Mental Support. We're here for you!
reminder_1h: 🔔 Your session starts in an hour. Find a quiet place and get ready. We're waiting for you! ❤️
reschedule_contact: 📝 To reschedule, choose a new slot:
c_schedule_intro:
📅 *Schedule Management*

Choose a day to set slots:
c_schedule_copy_week: 📋 Last week's schedule has been copied.
slot_cancelled_notify_user:
⚠️ Unfortunately, the consultant has cancelled the slot for {date} {time}.

Please choose another time:
o_companies_list:
🏢 *Companies:*

Select a company to manage or create a new one:
o_company_enter_contract_end: 📅 Enter contract end date (YYYY-MM-DD) or press «Skip»:
o_company_created:
✅ Company *{name}* created!

Invite codes have not been generated yet.
o_company_deactivated: ⛔ Company deactivated. All users have lost access.
o_consultant_added:
✅ Consultant *{name}* added!

Send them the invite link: {link}
o_consultant_exists: ⚠️ This user is already a consultant.
o_group_deleted: 🗑️ Group deleted. Participants have been notified.
group_deleted_notify: ⚠️ The group *{name}* you were registered for has been deleted.
o_feedback_no_data: 📭 No data for the selected period.
inactive_30d: 💙 Hi! We're here for you if you need support. Don't forget to take care of yourself!
inactive_60d: 💙 It's been 2 months — how are you? Mental Support is always here when you need help.
error_generic: ⚠️ Something went wrong. Please try again.
access_denied: ⛔ You don't have access to this section.
not_registered: ⚠️ You are not registered yet. Send /start to begin.
already_registered: ℹ️ You are already registered! Use /start to go to the menu.
o_limit_already_issued: ⚠️ Code limit already issued. Deactivate the company or increase the limit.
self_help_intro:
📖 *Self-help materials*

Short tips — not a replacement for therapy. Use the buttons to browse.
self_help_page_2:
🌙 *Sleep*

Regular sleep/wake time; dim screens an hour before bed.
self_help_page_3:
🔗 *Support*

If it’s hard, that’s OK. Emergency help and sessions are in the main menu.
who5_intro:
📊 *WHO-5 quick check*

5 questions about the last 2 weeks. Scale *0* (never) to *5* (always).

Not a diagnosis — a self-check.
who5_q1: 1/5. Have you felt cheerful and in good spirits?
who5_q2: 2/5. Have you felt calm and relaxed?
who5_q3: 3/5. Have you felt active and vigorous?
who5_q4: 4/5. Did you wake up feeling fresh and rested?
who5_q5: 5/5. Has your daily life been filled with things that interest you?
who5_rec_low: Many people find it helpful to *talk to a consultant* — book a session or use urgent support.
who5_rec_mid: Moderate level — if something worries you, booking a session is a good idea.
who5_rec_high: Good scores. Keep caring for yourself — support is here if you need it.
ui_stale_prompt:
⌛ *This screen is outdated*

Buttons here are disabled — use the *latest bot message* below.
ui_use_latest_message: Use the buttons on the latest bot message in this chat.
who5_stale_prompt:
⌛ *WHO-5 check cancelled*

Buttons here are disabled — use the *main menu* below.
who5_callback_stale: This questionnaire is no longer active. Open Wellbeing (WHO-5) from the main menu.
who5_use_latest_message: Use the buttons on the latest survey message below — only that one is active.
